name: cafefams-backend
description: Café Fams AI Chatbot Backend — v1.5.3: Plan B Step 1 — per-restaurant Razorpay payment credentials. /api/payment/create, /verify, and /webhook now resolve key_id/key_secret/webhook_secret from the restaurants table (with a per-field env-var fallback for 'cafefams' only), so a future second restaurant's payments can never be misdirected into Café Fams's own Razorpay account; requires running migration.sql. v1.5.2: adds a system-prompt rule preventing the AI from re-confirming (and duplicating) an order when a customer just wants to view their existing bill — paired with a frontend fix that stops the 'My Bill' button from ever reaching the AI at all. v1.5.1: IPv6/pooler connection diagnostics. v1.5.0: fixed silent data-loss bug (RLS policies blocked all Supabase writes), boot-time DB write self-test + Telegram alerting. v1.4.0: multi-tenant resolver, payment/price integrity, rate limiting, prompt-injection guardrails, memory/SSE fixes
